notes: SHIP v1.14.222 — FORGE 3D SCENE, STAGE 1 (per HANDOFF-forge-hero-scene.md, base .221). First stage of the Forge hero-scene campaign: build the Forge cold-aisle 3D scene, ALL RACKS GENERIC (no hero yet) — device-verify it matches forge-base (15).html before Stage 2 (hero swap). NOTE on numbering: the deploy-bug FIX (was earmarked .222 in HANDOFF-deploy-bug-hunt.md) is DEFERRED — it is blocked on John's captured error log from the .221 instrument and will take a later stamp; .221's capture is live and passive so the hunt is not stalled. WHAT: ported the scene-construction subset of forge-base (15).html (a full shift-simulator GAME) VERBATIM — MAT materials (floor 0x0a1520/rack 0x0d1520/rackFace 0x080e18), buildSingleRack (chassis 1.8x3.8x1.0, face, bezel, LED bar 0x00ccff emissive 0x00aaee ei4, 10 slot rows slotY=0.35+u*0.36 green dots 0x00ee55 + activity LEDs + 8 ports + per-rack cyan/floor PointLight glow pools), makeRackLabel (256x80 double-draw glow sprite), buildFloor (PlaneGeometry 60 + GridHelper 60,0x001a26,0x001218), buildLighting (AmbientLight 0x020810 + overhead 0x1a4060 PointLight strips + strip meshes + DirectionalLight 0x102030 castShadow), renderer (ACESFilmic exposure 0.6, PCFSoftShadowMap), FogExp2(0x000508,0.04). NONE of the game layer (FPS movement/gamepad, incidents, SLA, terminal, minimap, boot/HUD, debrief, Web Audio, TTS). DELIBERATE DEVIATIONS (reported): (1) FPS movement REPLACED with a manual spherical ORBIT (drag = azimuth/polar, wheel/pinch = radius; home camera ≈ (0,1.7,8) framing the aisle; polar 0.35-1.55, radius 5-22) — the app wants an orbit hero-scene, not a walk-around. (2) buildCeiling + buildWalls DROPPED — not in the spec §2 verbatim list (§2.6 floor + §2.7 lights only), and an enclosing ceiling/wall fights an orbit camera; the fog fades edges to black for the same enclosed feel. (3) PLACEMENT is spec §2.8 (NOT the mock's 48-rack C/D/E/F formation): front row z=0 F-01..F-06 across [-6.25,-3.75,-1.25,1.25,3.75,6.25], receding rows z=-6/-12 F-07..F-18 (18 racks); F-04 (x=1.25) reserved as the Stage-2 hero slot but built generic this stage. (4) buildLighting rows front-weighted to {-6,-12,-18} per §2.7. (5) makeRackLabel roundRect guarded (_rr fallback) for older Safari. OFFLINE/PORT: swapped the CDN r128 tag for the app's vendored vendor/three.min.js via loadScript (already SW-precached — NO PRECACHE_URLS change; CACHE_VERSION bumped only for the changed dct-ios.html bytes). No Tailwind/FontAwesome in this mock (nothing to strip). LIFECYCLE: a NEW self-contained forge3d_* module + full-screen #forge3d-sheet (.rd-sheet clone, body.rd-gated) + single persistent canvas in #forge3d-mount; clones the .218 single-context discipline (module var _forge3dActive bounds live GL contexts to 1; RAF cancel + full listener removal + scene.traverse geometry/material/map dispose + renderer.dispose + forceContextLoss + canvas.isConnected self-dispose + visibilitychange pause). iOS ONE-GL-CONTEXT CEILING honored: forge3d_open() disposes _reh3dActive (the rack-detail 3D) before building its own. Instrumented with phantom_logErr (.221) on every catch. PROVISIONAL DOOR: a body.rd-gated FORGE 3D button in the SYS panel (mirrors HW REF; hdr-agg-act = redesign-only for free) — relocate to the floor-map rack tap when the hero/rack-switch stages land (marked PROVISIONAL in a code comment for R1 cleanup). ADVERSARIAL REVIEW (3 refute-biased lenses, per-finding verified): fidelity lens CLEAN (ported scene confirmed verbatim vs the mock); ONE medium finding CONFIRMED + FIXED — the single-GL-context guard was ONE-directional (forge3d_open disposed _reh3dActive, but neither render fn cross-disposed the other), so a first-session async-load interleave (tap rack 3D → open SYS → tap FORGE 3D while three.js is still loading; loadScript doesn't dedupe) could leave BOTH contexts live → iOS crash. FIX: made the invariant SYMMETRIC — forge3d_render now also disposes a live _reh3dActive, and rackElevation_render3D now also disposes a live _forge3dActive; whichever builder runs last tears down the other → always one context. (Residual, noted: in the ultra-rare loser-interleave the losing view can render blank — no crash, self-recovers on reopen.) Additive island otherwise: one 3-line guard added to rackElevation_render3D (verified .218 code), no shared DOM ids, git revert clean. Gates: node --check sw.js + 4 inline HTML blocks (module pre-checked in isolation) · CSS brace balance · CRLF · three-stamp lockstep .221->.222 · single-context guard present · body.rd-gated (?legacy=1 byte-identical). DEVICE-VERIFY (Stage 1 checkpoint, HARD STOP): remove+re-add PWA, confirm v1.14.222, then — (1) SYS pill (header medallion) → panel → tap FORGE 3D → the full-screen aisle opens; (2) does the aisle MATCH forge-base (15).html / the clean screenshot? cyan LED bars along each rack top, green status-dot columns, floating glowing rack labels (F-01..F-18), dim blue-black room, reflective grid floor; (3) drag orbits, pinch/wheel zooms, close (X) returns; (4) open the rack-detail 3D (FLAT↔3D on a rack) THEN Forge 3D and back — confirm no orphan GPU / no second-context crash (single-context guard); (5) ?legacy=1 → NO FORGE 3D button in SYS, nothing else changed. Do NOT proceed to Stage 2 (hero) until the aisle matches to a T. ALSO STILL OWED (prior, unverified): .220 3D parity + .221 deploy instrument (batch verify, within the 6-ship cap).
